Rent a painting
made by our Art Workshop participants

Bring original artwork into your home, your next party, or school program. Every rental supports our artists and mission.

Weekly rentals · Friday to Friday Up to 4 weeks $7 / week Lorain delivery available

Rental instructions

  1. Click a painting to open it, choose your rental duration (1–4 weeks), select a Friday start date, and add it to your cart.
  2. A $50 refundable security deposit is added automatically.
  3. If you are in the city of Lorain and want delivery, select the delivery option — a $30 delivery fee will be added.
  4. Click Checkout, fill in your details, and complete payment.
  5. We will contact you to arrange pick-up or delivery.

Purchase order instructions (School Districts)

Check the "School District / Institution" box at checkout. Print the checkout page, attach it to your purchase order, and email it to startwithart2023@gmail.com. We will send you an invoice and arrange delivery.

Terms & Conditions

Security Deposit: A refundable $50 security deposit is required for all rentals. The deposit will be returned in full upon the artwork being returned in its original condition.

Care of Artwork: Renters may not use nails, tape, adhesives, or any materials that could damage the artwork. The renter is responsible for any damage beyond normal handling during the rental period.

Ownership & Reproduction: All artwork remains the sole property of Start W Art Calm. Renters may not reproduce, photograph for commercial use, sell, transfer, or claim ownership of any artwork.

Liability: The renter assumes full responsibility for the safety and condition of the artwork from the time of pick-up or delivery until its return.

You must agree to the Terms & Conditions to proceed.

Purchase Order Instructions: Complete checkout, then print the confirmation page, attach it to your purchase order, and email it to startwithart2023@gmail.com. We will send you an invoice and arrange delivery or pick-up.
